children.label: A
children.text: means an individual or entity that is not a United States person; and

children.heading: Government of Iran
children.label: 3 Government of Iran
children.text: The term “Government of Iran” has the meaning given such term in section 560.304 of title 31, Code of Federal Regulations, as such section was in effect on .January 1, 2021

children.label: B
children.text: a permanent resident alien of the United States;

children.label: C
children.text: an entity organized under the laws of the United States or of any jurisdiction within the United States, including a foreign branch of such an entity; or

children.label: D
children.text: a person in the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: is controlled or significantly influenced by the Government of Iran; and

children.label: B
children.text: knowingly receives material or financial support from the Government of Iran, including Hezbollah, the Houthis, or any other proxy group that furthers Iran’s national security objectives.

children.label: A
children.text: any goods, technology, software, or related material specified in the Missile Technology Control Regime Annex, as in effect on the day before ; andApril 24, 2024

children.label: B
children.text: any additional goods, technology, software, or related material added to the Missile Technology Control Regime Annex after the day before .April 24, 2024

children.label: A
children.text: a child, grandchild, parent, grandparent, sibling, or spouse; and

children.label: B
children.text: any spouse, widow, or widower of an individual described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Knowingly
children.label: 8 Knowingly
children.text: The term “knowingly” has the meaning given that term in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 ( note).50 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Missile Technology Control Regime
children.label: 9 Missile Technology Control Regime
children.text: The term “Missile Technology Control Regime” means the policy statement, between the United States, the United Kingdom, the Federal Republic of Germany, France, Italy, Canada, and Japan, announced on , to restrict sensitive missile-relevant transfers based on the Missile Technology Control Regime Annex, and any amendments thereto or expansions thereof, as in effect on the day before .April 16, 1987April 24, 2024

children.heading: Missile Technology Control Regime Annex
children.label: 10 Missile Technology Control Regime Annex
children.text: The term “Missile Technology Control Regime Annex” means the Guidelines and Equipment and Technology Annex of the Missile Technology Control Regime, and any amendments thereto or updates thereof, as in effect on the day before .April 24, 2024
